name: set_propagated_clock
full_help:
set_propagated_clock

Description: 
Specify propagated clock latency

Syntax: 
set_propagated_clock  [-quiet] [-verbose] <objects>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <objects>   List of clocks, ports, or pins

Categories: 
SDC, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
